examples: We investigate physicss properties of positronium and the way of positron - electron annihilation.
Positronium Time of Flight Spectroscopy (Ps-TOF) represents the properties about the pore size, direction and inner-connection in materials.
The characteristics of positronium, a kind of exotic atoms, and the applicability of using it to probe the reaction mechanism and the active intermediates are briefly introduced.
